meta_description: Learn how to marketing automation and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Solve 'No Portfolio' with Marketing Automation for Students
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no portfolio. Learn to build automated marketing tools using Antigravity and Claude Code. A complete guide for intermediate AI builders.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends when you stop chasing toy projects and start building utility. By automating marketing workflows—like lead scraping, content scheduling, or email personalization—you create tangible, measurable value. This guide uses Antigravity and Claude Code to turn your coding skills into a high-impact, automated portfolio asset.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank GitHub profile, the silence of a missing portfolio echoing louder than your ambition. You have the skills, but the market demands proof, not potential. The gap between student and developer isn't measured in years, but in the systems you’ve automated.

We aren't building another to-do list. We are engineering a marketing automation engine that solves a real business problem. By combining the architectural power of Antigravity with the rapid execution of Claude Code, you will transform your technical ability into a demonstrated, automated asset that screams 'hireable' to any recruiter.

steps.title: Define the Automation Objective
steps.description: Identify a repetitive marketing task like scraping niche news or sentiment analysis for social media. Focusing on a specific bottleneck provides the narrative for your portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior SaaS Architect. Define a schema for a marketing automation tool that scrapes news, summarizes it using LLMs, and formats it for a newsletter.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize a project structure for a marketing automation tool with a modular architecture.'

steps.title: Build the Scraper Engine
steps.description: Use Antigravity to handle the heavy lifting of web interaction. Focus on clean data extraction to ensure your pipeline has high-quality inputs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust web scraper module using Antigravity that handles pagination and filters relevant marketing content from industry blogs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add scraper.py --instructions 'Implement error handling and rate limiting for the news aggregator'.

steps.title: Implement AI Processing
steps.description: Integrate Claude to transform raw scraped text into actionable marketing insights or social media copy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a processing pipeline that sends scraped text to Claude API and returns summarized, SEO-optimized marketing copy.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write processor.py --instructions 'Inject Claude API logic to transform scraped data into newsletter content'.

steps.title: Automate the Delivery Pipeline
steps.description: Connect your processed data to an external service like SendGrid or a Slack webhook to demonstrate real-world deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure an integration module to push the final summarized content to a designated Slack channel via webhook.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add a notification service that sends processed data to a webhook endpoint'.

steps.title: Package for Portfolio Display
steps.description: Document your system architecture and performance metrics. A portfolio piece is only as good as its documentation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a professional README.md that highlights the system architecture, stack, and the specific business problem this tool solves.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write README.md --instructions 'Focus on the impact, the automation efficiency, and the technical challenges solved'.

pro_tips: Always include a 'Metrics' section in your README to show how much time your automation saves per week.
Use environment variables for all API keys; never hardcode credentials, even in portfolio projects.
Implement logging in your automation scripts so you can demonstrate how you monitor system health.
Add a 'Future Improvements' section to show you understand product roadmapping, not just coding.
Record a 60-second Loom demo of the tool in action; recruiters rarely read code but always watch videos.
resources: Best Practices for SaaS Architecture: https://12factor.net
content.next_steps: Deploy your automation tool on a cloud provider like Vercel or AWS, and link the live demo in your LinkedIn bio to start attracting recruiters immediately.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student; you are an engineer with a deployed system. Don't let your code sit idle in a private repo. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
